sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِتَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِ الْمَشْرُوعِ النَّاجِحِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici rade zajedno kako bi ostvarili ciljeve uspješnog projekta.
sentences.translationEn: Employees work together to achieve the goals of the successful project.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ زَمِيلَهُ فِي حَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac pomaže svom kolegi u rješavanju tehničkih problema.
sentences.translationEn: Each individual helps their colleague in solving technical problems.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ أَسْهَلَ وَأَسْرَعَ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja čini posao lakšim i bržim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation makes the work easier and faster for everyone.
